notes: Caesar-native taxonomy. Stable categories are approved for v0.2. Draft entries are included only with explicit status labels.

items.name: Privacy
items.description: Unauthorized data exposure or misuse in AI workflows.

items.name: Bias
items.description: Discriminatory or unfair outcomes from AI behavior.

items.name: Hallucination
items.description: Fabricated, false, or misleading AI outputs.

items.name: Safety
items.description: AI behavior that can contribute to physical or severe harm.

items.name: Security
items.description: Prompt injection, jailbreak, or other security failures.

items.name: Unauthorized Action
items.description: AI action outside approved scope or oversight boundaries.

items.name: Transparency
items.description: Undisclosed AI use or inadequate explainability.

items.name: Reliability
items.description: System failures or inconsistent behavior. Use top-level FM-REL only in v0.2 records.
items.usage_note: FM-REL sub-categories remain draft in v0.2.

items.name: Prompt Injection via Tool Output
items.description: Agent behavior manipulated through tool or connector responses.

items.name: Agent Scope Violation
items.description: Agent executes actions outside its approved task scope.

items.name: Unauthorized Tool Use
items.description: Agent uses tools/APIs that were not explicitly authorized.

items.name: Approval Bypass
items.description: Agent takes high-risk actions without required human approval.

items.name: Governance Gap
items.description: Absence or inadequacy of AI governance policies, processes, or controls required by regulation or best practice.

items.name: Compliance Deficit
items.description: Failure to implement or demonstrate compliance with applicable AI regulations, guidance, or standards.
